boundary_binding.action_boundary: May quality release the clinical batch?
boundary_binding.allow_rule_assessment: Closure CLOSE-XOR-078 exactly matches batch X-78, assay AX-22, criterion Cq<=31, and release date 2026-06-28 before shipment per policy STD-XOR-078-P. All source-boundary conditions satisfied.
boundary_binding.controlling_source_fact: CLOSE-XOR-078 provides exact closure match per STD-XOR-078-P policy requirements.
boundary_binding.timing_scope_authority_dependency_check: CLOSE-XOR-078 closure occurred before shipment date per BATCH-XOR-078. Exact match verified.

final_answer: The clinical batch X-78 may be released. Deviation closure CLOSE-XOR-078 precisely matches release requirements for batch X-78, assay AX-22, criterion Cq<=31, and release date 2026-06-28, as confirmed by policy STD-XOR-078-P. The closure occurred before shipment, satisfying all conditions for release.
